description_long: This house is a modern, rectangular residential building with a flat roof and a clean, minimalist facade. The front features a row of large, arched windows above a series of smaller rectangular windows, and two main entry doors separated by glass columns. The rear of the house opens onto a landscaped backyard with a patio, outdoor seating, and a row of mature trees providing privacy. The side yards are fenced and include additional green space, garden beds, and a paved walkway. The overall design emphasizes symmetry, open outdoor living areas, and a blend of natural and built elements. The building appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or stucco, with glass and metal accents.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large arched windows, landscaped backyard, and minimalist facade. Features include symmetrical window rows, dual entry doors, and extensive outdoor living space.
description_view_0: Front view showing symmetrical facade, arched upper windows, two main entry doors, and a landscaped strip with small trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the fenced backyard, outdoor seating, garden beds, and a row of mature trees along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full backyard, patio area, outdoor furniture, and the house's flat roof and window arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional green space, paved walkways, and the continuation of the backyard landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Dual main doors with glass columns, no porch, minimal steps, and a clean, modern aesthetic
